## Verdict & Recommendations

### ⭐⭐⭐⭐ ADSK — Autodesk, Inc. (4.0/5)
**Rating: SPECULATIVE BUY — RSI 26.00 / RSI-9 20.24 Extreme Oversold · New 52-wk Low $185.50 (Jun 23, 2026)**

**Bull Case:**
- P/E 27.42× — very attractive valuation for high-quality SaaS
- 90.9% gross margin and 18.3% TTM revenue growth ($7.51B); EPS $6.85 (+46.8%)
- RSI 14-day = **26.00**, RSI 9-day = **20.24** (extreme oversold) — highest probability mean-reversion bounce zone
- 34 analysts — 91.2% Buy, 0 Sell — consensus very bullish
- 69.7% upside to analyst avg PT ($318.53); high PT $456
- Exane BNP Paribas initiated Buy / $295 (Jun 2026); UBS reiterated Buy / $290
- Q1 FY2027 beat with raised guidance (FY27: $8.155–8.215B)
- Volume normalized to 4.6M Jun 22 after 9.2M spike Jun 18 — exhaustion pattern confirmed
- Jun 23 pre-market: $190.00 (+1.21%) — potential bounce beginning

**Bear Case:**
- New 52-week low $185.50 hit Jun 22 — technical breakdown accelerating
- Trading below ALL key MAs (5/20/50/200-day); ADX 39.43 = strong downtrend intensifying
- -43% from 52-wk high $329.09
- $3.6B all-cash MaintainX deal adds leverage risk + integration risk
- MACD bearish crossover sustained since May 26; NASDAQ -1.32% Jun 22 headwind

**Action Plan:**
- **Entry zone:** $185–$192 (at/near new 52-wk low — RSI extreme oversold)
- **Stop-loss:** $180 (below new 52-wk low)
- **Targets:** $194–200 (ST) → $220–230 (6M) → $318 (12M)
- ⚠️ RSI 26 / RSI-9 20 = extreme oversold — mean reversion highly probable. Wait for green daily close above $192 with volume >4M as reversal confirmation. Jun 23 pre-market bounce to $190 is encouraging but not confirmed

### ⭐⭐⭐⭐ NOW — ServiceNow, Inc. (4.0/5)
**Rating: HOLD — Approaching $90–93 Support; Speculative Entry Near (Jun 23, 2026)**

**Bull Case:**
- 21.7% TTM revenue growth ($13.96B); Net Income $1.76B (+14.2%)
- Now Assist AI: $1M+ ACV customers grew 130%+ YoY
- Platform moat via Moveworks + Veza + Armis acquisitions
- $5B buyback + $2B ASR = management confidence; Forward P/E 21.45× (reasonable)
- cRPO $12.64B (+22.5% YoY) = strong forward revenue visibility
- 48 analysts — 89.6% Buy — still very high conviction despite sell
- 52.7% upside to avg PT $141.98; approaching $90–93 speculative buy zone
- Q2 FY26 guidance: $3.815–3.820B sub rev; full-year FY26: $15.735–15.775B
- Jul 22 earnings = major catalyst — beat could reverse downtrend rapidly
- Jun 23 pre-market: $94.36 (+1.45%) — possible short-term bounce from $91.48 low

**Bear Case:**
- Continued slide to $93.01 Jun 22 (-2.14%); 24.8M volume = sustained distribution
- Trading below ALL key MAs (5/20/50/200-day)
- -56% from 52-week high ($211.48)
- RSI 39.25 (not yet oversold — more downside possible before bounce)
- AI restructuring adds uncertainty (employees + cost structure)
- Multiple concurrent integrations (Armis, Veza, Moveworks) = execution risk
- P/E 55.37× — still expensive despite selloff
- 1 Strong Sell analyst added to consensus (new headwind)

**Action Plan:**
- **Approaching speculative buy zone** — nibble at $90–$93
- **Full position:** Only if RSI drops below 30 (extreme oversold) with volume surge
- **Stop-loss:** $87 (below $90–92 support zone)
- **Targets:** $96–100 (ST reclaim) → $115 (6M) → $142 (12M)
- ⚠️ Watch Jul 22 earnings as primary catalyst — guidance beat could close gap to $105+. Avoid chasing above $96 until $100 reclaimed on volume

| Forward P/E | 🟢 **14.56× (very cheap forward)** | 🟡 21.45× | ADSK |
| **Overall** | **4.0/5 ⭐ — Speculative Buy (Extreme Oversold)** | **4.0/5 ⭐ — Hold / Approaching Support** | **ADSK Stronger Edge (Valuation + Oversold)** |

## Support & Resistance Levels

### ADSK — Bearish Structure (as of Jun 15, 2026)

| Level | Daily | Weekly | Type |

| R3 | $225–234 | $276.58 (52-wk high) | Breakdown zone / 52-wk high |
| R2 | $215–220 | $255 | VWAP + Volume POC / weekly top |
| R1 | $203–205 | $225 | Immediate resistance / weekly close |
| **PRICE** | **$197–199** | **$197–199** | **Current** |
| S1 | $193–196 | $188 | Test zone / weekly structure |
| S2 | $188 | $168.20 (52-wk low) | Major support / 52-wk low |
| S3 | $180 | — | Extreme / capitulation |

**Daily key zone:** $188–$196 is the make-or-break support band. A close below $188 on high volume opens $168.  
**Weekly view:** Resistance wall at $225–$255 makes any recovery a multi-month project.

**Daily key zone:** $98–$100 is fortress support (VWAP + 10.2M-share HVN). A bounce from here targets $108–$115.  
**Weekly view:** Closing above $110 on a weekly basis would confirm the uptrend and target the 200d SMA at $143.

## Candle Patterns — Daily

### ADSK Daily Patterns (May 19 – Jun 13, 2026)

| Date | Pattern | Type | Signal |
|---|---|---|---|
| May 21 | Shooting Star | Bearish Reversal | After 2-day rally, long upper shadow = sellers rejected the move |
| May 28 | Bearish Marubozu | Strong Bearish | MaintainX deal + MA breakdown — open near high, close near low, no wicks |
| May 30 | Bearish Harami | Continuation | Small body inside prior red candle — no buying conviction |
| Jun 10 | Doji | Exhaustion | Open ≈ Close after extended decline — potential seller fatigue |
| Jun 11 | Hammer | Potential Reversal | Long lower wick = buyers stepped in at $199 — watch for follow-through above $203 |

**ADSK Pattern Verdict:** 4 bearish patterns followed by 1 tentative hammer. Hammer at Jun 11 is not confirmed until price closes above $203 with expanding volume. Treat as watch only.

---

### NOW Daily Patterns (May 19 – Jun 13, 2026)

| Date | Pattern | Type | Signal |
|---|---|---|---|
| May 22 | Bullish Engulfing | Bullish Reversal | Large green candle engulfs prior red — strong buying conviction |
| May 27 | Shooting Star | Pause/Warning | Brief pullback after strong run — quickly resolved to upside |
| Jun 2 | Doji at Top | Overbought Exhaustion | RSI ~70 zone, indecision after rally to $100.50 |
| Jun 9 | Shooting Star | Overbought Warning | RSI ~73, rejected at $103.50 high — caution signal |
| Jun 13 | Evening Doji / Shooting Star | OB Warning | Second consecutive warning at RSI >70 zone |

**NOW Pattern Verdict:** Bullish engulfing at the start confirmed the rally. Two shooting stars near $103–$105 with RSI >70 suggest near-term mean reversion risk. Support at $98–$100 on any pullback.

## Volume Profile — Analysis & Findings

### ADSK Volume Profile (30-Day, as of Jun 15, 2026)

**Point of Control (POC):** $215–220 zone (9.3M shares) — heaviest traded price level.

| Metric | Value | Interpretation |
|---|---|---|
| POC | $215–220 | Now acts as overhead resistance (~8% above current price) |
| Value Area High (VAH) | ~$225 | Upper boundary of 70% volume zone |
| Value Area Low (VAL) | ~$200 | Lower boundary — price is at/below VAL |
| Current Price vs VAL | ~$191 — BELOW VAL | Bearish: trading well outside value area to the downside |
| High Volume Node (HVN) | $210–215 (6.3M) | Secondary resistance on any bounce |
| Low Volume Node (LVN) | $230–235 (4.1M) | If price ever reclaims, could move quickly through this zone |
| Current Zone Volume | $196–200 (5.2M) | Moderate volume = price finding no strong floor yet |

**Summary Finding:** ADSK is in a distribution phase. The 9.3M-share POC sits $27.5 above current price ($187.72) and will act as a major lid on any recovery rally. Bears control the tape until ADSK reclaims $200 (VAL) on strong volume. New 52-wk low $185.50 now the critical support; RSI 26.00 / RSI-9 20.24 = extreme oversold bounce zone near.

---

### NOW Volume Profile (30-Day, as of Jun 15, 2026)

**Point of Control (POC):** $100–105 zone (12.1M shares) — heaviest traded price level.

| Metric | Value | Interpretation |
|---|---|---|
| POC | $100–105 | Current price is TRADING INSIDE the POC — healthy accumulation |
| Value Area High (VAH) | ~$105 | Breakout level — close above here with volume = bullish |
| Value Area Low (VAL) | ~$96 | Strong floor with 10.2M-share HVN just below |
| Current Price vs POC | $104.27 — ABOVE POC | Bullish: price has broken above the POC zone |
| High Volume Node (HVN) | $96–100 (10.2M) | Rock-solid support — institutional buying base |
| Low Volume Node (LVN) | $105–110 (2.3M) | Breakout above $105 = very low resistance → fast move to $115 |
| Base Volume | $85–88 (4.2M) | Low-volume base from earlier in period |

**Summary Finding:** NOW has fallen below its 12.1M-share POC ($100–105), converting accumulation into overhead supply. At $93.01, price is in the thin $92–96 zone — low volume historically means price can move quickly in either direction. The 10.2M-share HVN at $96–100 is now resistance. Watch $90–92 (HVN base) as the next meaningful support floor. Jul 22 earnings = potential re-rating catalyst.

## Dashboard Features

### Interactive Chart Capabilities (dashboard.html)

| Feature | Details |
|---|---|
| **Chart Ranges** | Daily (May 19–Jun 13) · Weekly (Mar 3–Jun 13, 15 wks) · Hourly (Apr 1–Jun 13, ~385 bars) |
| **Chart Styles** | Line · Candlestick · OHLC Bar · Heikin Ashi · Renko — 5 types, all real-time via toolbar or gallery |
| **Chart Style Gallery** | 5 live mini-chart previews below the price charts — click any card to apply style instantly |
| **CandlePlugin** | Self-contained `afterDatasetsDraw` plugin draws candle/OHLC/HA shapes via canvas 2D API. Replaced incompatible `chartjs-chart-financial@0.2.1` (built for Chart.js 3, crashed Chart.js 4). |
| **RSI Indicator** | RSI(5), RSI(10), RSI(20) — multi-select, rendered as sub-panel below each chart with OB/OS lines at 70/30 |
| **Bollinger Bands** | BB(10) for daily/weekly, BB(20) for hourly — upper/mid/lower bands with translucent fill |
| **Fibonacci Retracement** | Auto-calculated from visible period high/low — 7 levels: 0%, 23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8%, 78.6%, 100% |
| **Candle Patterns** | 5 annotated patterns per stock on Daily + Candlestick/Heikin Ashi view; OB/OS zone bands |
| **Heikin Ashi** | Computed as `haO=(prevO+prevC)/2`, `haC=(O+H+L+C)/4` — bull candles teal, bear red |
| **Renko** | ATR-based brick size, floating bar chart, tooltip shows brick #/price range/direction |
| **Dark/Light Mode** | Full CSS variable theme toggle; all 4 charts update on switch; persists via `localStorage` |
| **Zoom/Pan** | Scroll-to-zoom + drag-to-pan on all price charts; Reset button; Renko uses brick-number x-axis |
| **S/R Levels** | Dedicated card: Daily + Weekly S/R for both stocks with colour-coded support/resistance/key badges |
| **Volume Profile** | 30-day bar charts + written description explaining POC, VAH, VAL, HVN, LVN + summary findings |
| **Scroll Animation** | AOS fade-in on all sections; CountUp animated numbers on prices, market caps, targets |
| **Tooltips** | Tippy.js on RSI, MACD, EMA, SMA, VWAP, cRPO — explains each indicator inline |
| **Scroll Progress** | Gradient progress bar at top tracks page position; sticky navbar with blur backdrop |

### Chart Style Notes

| Style | Algorithm | Best Used For |
|---|---|---|
| Line | Simple close-price line with area fill | Long-range trend, indicator overlays |
| Candlestick | Standard OHLC — open/close body + high/low wick | Pattern analysis, entry/exit timing |
| OHLC Bar | Left tick = open, right tick = close, stem = high/low | Compact institutional view |
| Heikin Ashi | Smoothed OHLC — consecutive same-colour = unbroken trend | Trend following, filtering whipsaws |
| Renko | New brick only when price moves ≥ brick_size (ATR-based) | Filtering time noise, pure support/resistance |
